    move('Hero', 10, 6) # Collect Vampire Blood
    fight('Hero')

for _ in range(8): # Get 8 pieces of Dead Wood
    move('Hero', 9, 8) # Collect Dead Wood
    gather('Hero') # Chop Dead Tree

for _ in range(2): # Collect Red Cloth
    move('Hero', 8, 7) # Collect Red Cloth
    fight('Hero')

gather('Hero')

gather('Hero')

gather('Hero')

gather('Hero')

equip('Hero', 'ring1_slot', 'sapphire_ring')
equip('Hero', 'amulet_slot', 'diamond_amulet')
equip('Hero', 'weapon_slot', 'greater_dreadful_staff')

fight('Hero')
